150 # Priority rules for ondelete:
151 # 1. RESTRICT - Prevents deletion of parent record (use for critical relationships)
152 #    - Patient with unpaid invoices
153 #    - Patient with medical records that must be retained
154 #
155 # 2. SET NULL - Allows deletion, sets FK to NULL (use for most cases)
156 #    - Audit trails (created_by, updated_by)
157 #    - Historical references (doctor who was deleted)
158 #    - Medical records (preserve even if linked record deleted)
159 #
160 # 3. CASCADE - Deletes child records when parent deleted (use carefully)
161 #    - Session tokens when user deleted
162 #    - Invoice items when invoice deleted
163 #    - File versions when file deleted
164 #
165 # 4. NO ACTION - Database default, may cause FK constraint errors
166 
167 def print_migration_code():
168     """Generate Alembic migration code for FK updates"""
169 
170     print("""
171 # Migration to add ONDELETE clauses to ForeignKey constraints
172 # IMPORTANT: This is a destructive migration - backup database first!
173 
174 from alembic import op
175 import sqlalchemy as sa
176 
177 def upgrade():
178     # Example migration for a single FK:
179     # op.drop_constraint('fk_table_column', 'table', type_='foreignkey')
180     # op.create_foreign_key(
181     #     'fk_table_column', 'table', 'parent_table',
182     #     ['column'], ['id'], ondelete='SET NULL'
183     # )
184     pass
185 
186 def downgrade():
187     pass
188 """)

194     # Group by table
195     tables = {}
196     for fk, policy in FK_ONDELETE_POLICIES.items():
197         table, column = fk.split(".")
198         if table not in tables:
199             tables[table] = []
200         tables[table].append((column, policy))
201 
202     for table in sorted(tables.keys()):
203         print(f"\n{table}:")
204         for column, policy in tables[table]:
205             print(f"  {column}: {policy}")
206 
207     print("\n" + "=" * 50)
208     print("Total FKs documented:", len(FK_ONDELETE_POLICIES))

72     def verify_token(
73         self, token: str, token_type: str = "access"
74     ) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
75         """Проверяет JWT токен (без проверки blacklist)"""
76         try:
77             payload = jwt.decode(
78                 token, settings.SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[self.algorithm]
79             )
80             if payload.get("type") != token_type:
81                 return None
82             return payload
83         except jwt.ExpiredSignatureError:
84             logger.warning("Token expired")
85             return None
86         except jwt.InvalidTokenError:
87             logger.warning("Invalid token")
88             return None
89

89 
90     def verify_token_with_blacklist(
91         self, db: Session, token: str, token_type: str = "access"
92     ) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
93         """
94         Проверяет JWT токен с проверкой черного списка.
95 
96         Используйте этот метод для критических операций.
97         """
98         payload = self.verify_token(token, token_type)
99         if not payload:
100             return None
101 
102         jti = payload.get("jti")
103         if not jti:
104             return payload  # Старые токены без jti пропускаем
105 
106         # Проверяем blacklist
107         from app.services.token_blacklist_service import token_blacklist_service
108         if token_blacklist_service.is_token_blacklisted(db, jti):
109             logger.warning(f"Token {jti} is blacklisted")
110             return None
111 
112         return payload
